questions.question: In a discriminant analysis model, which type of variable is likely to have the strongest relationship with the dependent variable?
questions.hint: Describe the type of variable you think is most strongly related and explain why.

questions.question: A covariance matrix is used to determine the strength of relationships between variables. Which type of variable is most likely to have the strongest relationships with the other variables?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of covariance and how it applies to different types of variables.

questions.question: Which of the following variables is most likely to have the strongest relationship with the dependent variable in a generalized linear model?
questions.hint: Describe the concept of generalized linear models and how they relate to the dependent variable.
